title: Bee Removal in Franklin Square, Long Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive removal for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Franklin Square residents facing bee infestations need fast, professional removal services to protect their families and properties. Our experienced technicians provide safe, humane bee removal throughout Franklin Square, from the tree-lined streets near Rath Park to the bustling commercial areas along Hempstead Turnpike. We specialize in removing bee hives from homes, sheds, and businesses while prioritizing the safety of both people and pollinators.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Franklin Square and surrounding Long Island communities with reliable, affordable bee removal services. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely extract bee colonies, and we offer same-day service with transparent pricing from $350 to $550 with no hidden fees.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of post-war residential homes, garden-style apartment complexes, and commercial properties along New Hyde Park Road creates various environments where bees commonly nest in wall voids, attics, and overhangs. The mature trees throughout neighborhoods near Wellington Road and around local landmarks like the Franklin Square Public Library provide natural habitats that sometimes bring bees too close to homes and businesses.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service throughout Franklin Square. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Our technicians serve all Franklin Square neighborhoods and can typically complete bee hive removal in 1-3 hours depending on the location and size of the colony.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 bee removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection to locate the hive, safe removal of the entire bee colony, extraction of honeycomb and hive materials, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive size, location accessibility, and the extent of the infestation.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination to protect these important pollinators. Our trained technicians work with local beekeepers to relocate healthy colonies. However, in cases where the hive poses immediate danger or relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted treatments that minimize environmental impact while ensuring your safety.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services covered by homeowners insurance in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Some homeowners insurance policies in Franklin Square may cover bee removal, especially if the infestation has caused structural damage or poses a safety hazard. We recommend contacting your insurance provider to verify coverage. We provide detailed invoices and documentation that you can submit to your insurance company for potential reimbursement.
